## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss a potential strategic partnership with Bolt.new for creating SEO-friendly app templates and landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bolt.new, a rapidly growing AI company, is seeking to compete with Lovable by creating SEO-friendly app templates and landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [The project involves creating thousands of landing pages for various app categories and use cases, with the potential for a strategic partnership](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [The approach combines SEO strategy, content creation, and app development, leveraging both companies' strengths and data](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [The partnership could provide significant brand association benefits and a compelling success story for both parties](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)

## Topics

### Bolt.new's Strategic Initiative

  - [Bolt.new aims to create SEO-friendly templates and landing pages to compete with Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [The company grew from zero to $20 million rapidly, with Madrona as an investor](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Mitchell, a former workshop host, is now leading growth efforts at Bolt.new](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [The goal is to capture the long tail of every possible app category or use case for Bolt.new's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### SEO Strategy and Content Creation

  - [The project involves creating up to 100,000 landing pages for various app categories and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [SEO strategy includes:](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Scraping G2 categories and generating synonyms](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Identifying vertical-specific and technology-based variants (e.g., banking CRM)](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Utilizing tools like SEMrush for keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Content creation challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [Generating ideas and executing templates at scale](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [Finding designers for high-quality visuals](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [Balancing quantity with quality (each proper boilerplate takes about half a day)](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

### Strategic Partnership Potential

  - [Possibility of a formal strategic partnership announcement](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [GrowthX could help create apps, screenshots, and generate competition](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [The partnership could mirror the Airtable model, with both company-generated and user-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Potential for significant brand association benefits, similar to Perplexity's strategy](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Traffic and Data Utilization

  - [Initial focus on creating landing pages to generate traffic and gather data](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Use traffic and signup data to prioritize which templates or apps to build](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Leverage Bolt.new's existing data on user behavior and app creation patterns](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Aim for rapid feedback cycle: within a month, identify top-performing pages and focus on those for full app development](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Multiple companies entering the space, creating urgency for Bolt.new](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Potential for major players like Cursor to disrupt the market](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Speed and quality of templates/apps will be crucial for success](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a meeting with Bolt.new to discuss the potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Jakub to join the meeting and share insights from similar projects at Softer](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of a formal strategic partnership announcement](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Begin planning for large-scale landing page creation and SEO strategy implementation](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Investigate ways to automate parts of the research and content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/GthzuUcLX1o3yzXxcKys9GcM9GyDK2RY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
